subject: Lafayette office move
body:
According to Rich, shutting down Lafayette's office will result in an  annual 
savings of approximately $100,000.  Against this savings, you  may wish to 
weigh whether and to what extent moving Bill and Monique will  disrupt things or 
affect morale at FTC.  This may not be a huge  consideration, but in truth, 
Cecile, Jeanne and the crew at FTC are kind of  territorial.  They are 
typically resistant to being grouped with LSJ and  were fairly negative about working 
with John Amerling (which may be simply  because of John and not necessarily 
anything to do with Lafayette in  general).  I am not sure what introducing 
Monique and Bill into that mix  will do, if anything.  Of course the people of 
FTC are incredibly loyal to  you and will do whatever it is that you ask of 
them, but it may have subtle  impacts on them.  Just thought that you might wish 
to be aware of this,  even if it does not change the decision.  Nor am I 
advocating that  Lafayette should take smaller space with John Amerling (I would 
rather keep Bill  and Monique away from him in any event).
 
Darren K.  Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New  York 10022
Tel: 212-750-1176
Fax: 212-750-0381
e-mail: _dkiesq@aol.com_ (mailto:dkiesq@aol.com)
